sourcesContent:
const WeatherCard = ({ city, icon, temperature, feelsLike, condition, wind, humidity, aqi }) => { // extract AQI safely const aqiValue = aqi?.["us-epa-index"] ?? aqi?.air_quality?.["us-epa-index"] ?? aqi; const hasAQI = aqiValue !== undefined && aqiValue !== null; return (

{city}

{temperature}
{condition}
🌡️ Feels: {feelsLike}
💨 Wind: {wind}
💧 Humidity: {humidity}
{aqi}
🌬 Wind {wind} km/h
💧 Humidity {humidity}%
AQI {aqi}
); }; export default WeatherCard;
